
```{r setup}
# devtools::install_github("samperochkin/hpoltest")
library("hpoltest")
library('data.table')
allData = readRDS('/store/patrick/copernicus/agg/indiaForCC.rds')
allData = as.data.table(allData)
allData = allData[!is.na(allData$ecoRegionInt), ]
allData$sqrtPm = sqrt(pmin(allData$pm,1000))
allData$timeIid = as.numeric(allData$date)
allData$tempClean = pmax(allData$tempd, -10)


cc_design <- ccDesign(strat_vars = c("cell","ecoRegionInt", "yearMonthDow") )


pmKnots = c(0, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 32) # on square root scale
tempKnots = c(-10, -5, 5, 10, 20, 25, 30)

formula <- count ~ #od(date) +
  hiwp(sqrtPm,  ref_value = sqrt(25), knots = pmKnots, group_var = ecoRegionInt) +
  hiwp(tempClean, ref_value = 10, knots = tempKnots, group_var = ecoRegionInt)
```

```{r fit}
if(exists('fit')) {
  start = fit$obj$env$last.par.best
  tmb_parameters = list(
      beta = start[grep("beta", names(start))],
      gamma = start[grep("gamma", names(start))],
      theta = start[grep("theta", names(start))]
    )
} else {
  tmb_parameters = NULL
}
fit <- hnlm(
  formula, allData, cc_design = cc_design,
  tmb_parameters = tmb_parameters
  )
```


```{r res}
fit$obj$env$last.par.best[names(fit$obj$env$last.par.best) == "beta"]
#
fit$obj$env$last.par.best[names(fit$obj$env$last.par.best) == "theta"]
```



```{r resEffects}

#newdata = data.frame(sqrtPm = seq(0, sqrt(200), len=200), ecoRegionInt = 'Global')
newdata = data.frame(sqrtPm = seq(0, sqrt(200), len=200), ecoRegionInt = 18)

parMle = fit$obj$env$last.par.best

betaHat = parMle[names(parMle) == 'beta']
#betaHat = betaHat[fit$beta_info$Xid]
names(betaHat) = fit$beta_info$var

whichIsGamma = which(names(parMle) == "gamma")
gammaHat = parMle[whichIsGamma]
varGammaHat = solve(fit$obj$env$spHess()[whichIsGamma, whichIsGamma])

# identify the random effects needed in newdata
varInfo = do.call(rbind, lapply(fit$terms, function(xx) unlist(xx[c('var','type')])))
Sterms = which(varInfo[,'var'] %in% names(newdata))

newDesignMat = hpoltest:::getNewXA(fit$terms[Sterms], newdata)

betaHatHere = betaHat[grep(paste(unique(varInfo[Sterms,'var']), collapse='|'), names(betaHat))]
newdata$fixed = drop(newDesignMat$X %*% betaHatHere)


Sid = unlist(lapply(fit$terms[Sterms], function(xx) xx$id))
gammaIndices = which(fit$gamma_info$id %in% Sid)
gammaHatHere = gammaHat[gammaIndices]
varGammaHatHere = varGammaHat[gammaIndices, gammaIndices]

newdata$mean = drop(newDesignMat$A %*% gammaHatHere) + newdata$fixed
newdata$sd =sqrt(apply( (newDesignMat$A %*% varGammaHatHere) * newDesignMat$A, 1, sum))


ciMat = array(c(1, -1.95996398454005, 1, 1.95996398454005), dim = c(2,2), 
              dimnames = list(c("mean", "sd"), paste0(c("0.025", "0.975"), 'quant')))

lowerUpper = as.matrix(newdata[,c('mean','sd')]) %*% ciMat
newdata = cbind(newdata, as.data.frame(lowerUpper))

matplot(
  newdata$sqrtPm^2,
  newdata[,c('mean','0.025quant','0.975quant')],
  ylim = range(newdata[-(1:20),c('0.025quant','0.975quant')]),
  type='l', lty=c(1,2,2), col='black', xaxs='i', bty='n'
)

```
